# Contributing to OrdoVertex

Thank you for your interest in contributing! We welcome:
- 🐛 Bug reports
- 💡 Feature requests  
- 🔧 Code contributions
- 📖 Documentation improvements

## Quick Start

1. Fork the repo
2. Create a branch (`git checkout -b feature/my-feature`)
3. Make changes
4. Test (`npm test`)
5. Commit (`git commit -m 'Add feature'`)
6. Push (`git push origin feature/my-feature`)
7. Open Pull Request

## Adding New Nodes

See [Adding New Nodes](../README.md#adding-new-nodes) in the README.

## Code Style

- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier
- Meaningful names
- JSDoc for public APIs
